candidate_evaluation.raw_91_C3_honest: Selected from cycle 18 4th-sister census (proposals/hexa_weave_biology_4th_sister_census_2026_04_28.md). Selection justified on genus-distinction (non-covalent thermodynamic/kinetic self-assembly distinct from covalent composition / mechanical actuation / chemical catalysis), n6 invariant projection STRUCTURAL-EXACT (T=1 icosahedral capsid sigma(6)=12 vertex, octahedral subgroup of icosahedral I via 5-inscribed-cube outer action, tau(6)=4 assembly states free-CP / pentamer / hexamer / capsid, phi(6)=2 closed/open shell), multi-realizability (>=4 capsid families CCMV / TYMV / SV40 / MS2; >=2 frameworks Caspar-Klug 1962 / Bruinsma-Gelbart 2003), and absence of axis collision (no life/virocapsid; closest life/vaccinology uses VLPs as vehicle, not architectural primitive).

registration_intent.domain_class: viral capsid self-assembly architecture / non-covalent thermodynamic-kinetic protein-shell formation
registration_intent.rationale: HEXA-WEAVE registers write-side multi-strand molecular design composition (covalent linear chain bundle, primary constraint Landauer x NP-search ceiling, primary oracle AlphaFold-class fold inference). HEXA-NANOBOT registers single molecular nano-machine architecture (primary constraint Brownian thermal floor at 310K, primary oracle molecular-dynamics simulation). HEXA-RIBOZYME registers catalytic RNA architecture (primary constraint diffusion-limit ceiling, primary oracle chemical-kinetics simulation + RNA-secondary-structure prediction). HEXA-VIROCAPSID registers a fourth orthogonal sub-axis covering viral capsid self-assembly (primary constraint thermodynamic stability vs kinetic trap competition under Caspar-Klug T-number quasi-equivalence, primary oracle coarse-grained MD + master-equation kinetic models a la Zlotnick / Hagan). The four-way split is genus-level: WEAVE composes covalent strands; NANOBOT actuates atoms; RIBOZYME catalyses bonds; VIROCAPSID self-assembles non-covalent shells. Caspar-Klug 1962, Crick-Watson 1956, Zlotnick 1994, Bruinsma 2003, and Reddy 2001 (VIPERdb) define the capsid-architecture literature corpus.

n6_invariant_projection.sigma_6_eq_12: T=1 icosahedral capsid: 12 vertices = 12 pentameric capsomers (STRUCTURAL-EXACT)
n6_invariant_projection.tau_6_eq_4: 4 assembly states: free-CP / pentamer / hexamer / capsid
n6_invariant_projection.J_2_eq_24: octahedral subgroup of icosahedral I (order 60) via 5-inscribed-cube outer action
n6_invariant_projection.phi_6_eq_2: binary shell state: closed (mature) / open (assembly intermediate, swelling, uncoating)

verdict_classification_basis: raw 69 ceiling-classification: theoretical-analytical only; no empirical capsid-MD-simulation or in-vitro reconstitution executed in this cycle; F-VIROCAPSID-3 90-day MVP gate 2026-07-28

F-VIROCAPSID-2: kinetic trap dominates over thermodynamic minimum (Hagan-Chandler 2006)

raw_91_C3_disclosure: Domain registration is theoretical-analytical APPROACH tier. No mechanical Lean4 proof, no MD simulation, no in-vitro reconstitution. Domain entry creates the structural skeleton for cycle 20+ MVP work. T=1 sigma=12 is STRUCTURAL-EXACT for the simplest icosahedral capsid only; T>=3 capsids (60T>12) need separate stratification. raw 142 D2 try-and-revert: registration is reversible by removing the domain entry from biology/_index.json and the canonical body doc.
